---
title: "Warehouse Watts"
subtitle: "Costco deals for cyclists — fuel, hydration, recovery, gear."
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)

read_site <- function(name) {
  path <- file.path("data/site", name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  df <- read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) NULL else df
}

empty_msg <- function() {
  cat("> Nothing yet — check back Monday.\n\n")
}

link_title <- function(title, url) {
  ifelse(!is.na(url) & nchar(url) > 0,
         paste0('<a href="', url, '" target="_blank">', title, '</a>'),
         title)
}

fmt_price <- function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "—", paste0("$", formatC(x, format="f", digits=2)))
```

## 🔥 On Sale Now

```{r on-sale}
df <- read_site("on_sale_now.csv")

if (is.null(df)) {
  empty_msg()
} else {
  df |>
    mutate(
      title   = link_title(title, url),
      price   = fmt_price(price),
      price_was = fmt_price(price_was),
      pct_off = ifelse(is.na(pct_off), "—", paste0(pct_off, "%"))
    ) |>
    select(Item = title, Price = price, `Was` = price_was,
           `% Off` = pct_off, Category = category, Source = source) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = Item) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(color = "#2e7d32", weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_body(columns = `% Off`)
    ) |>
    tab_options(table.width = pct(100), table.font.size = "14px") |>
    cols_align(align = "left", columns = everything())
}
```

## 🗣️ Community Buzz

*Prices are community-reported — verify in store before driving out.*

```{r buzz}
df <- read_site("community_buzz.csv")

if (is.null(df)) {
  empty_msg()
} else {
  df |>
    mutate(
      title  = link_title(title, url),
      price  = fmt_price(price),
      signal = ifelse(is.na(signal), "—", formatC(as.integer(signal), format="d", big.mark=",")),
      date   = format(date, "%b %d")
    ) |>
    select(Item = title, Price = price, `👍 Upvotes` = signal,
           Category = category, Source = source, Date = date) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = Item) |>
    tab_options(table.width = pct(100), table.font.size = "14px") |>
    cols_align(align = "left", columns = everything())
}
```

## 🆕 New at Costco

```{r new-items}
df <- read_site("new_items.csv")

if (is.null(df)) {
  empty_msg()
} else {
  df |>
    mutate(
      title = link_title(title, url),
      price = fmt_price(price)
    ) |>
    select(Item = title, Price = price, Category = category) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = Item) |>
    tab_options(table.width = pct(100), table.font.size = "14px") |>
    cols_align(align = "left", columns = everything())
}
```

## 📈 Price Trends

```{r trends}
df <- read_site("price_trends.csv")

if (is.null(df) || n_distinct(df$date) < 2) {
  empty_msg()
} else {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = as.Date(date), y = price, color = title, group = title)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}
```

## 🏆 Fuel Value Leaderboard

*Lower $/100g carbs = more fuel for your dollar.*

```{r fuel-value}
df <- read_site("fuel_value.csv")

if (is.null(df)) {
  empty_msg()
} else {
  df |>
    mutate(
      title             = link_title(title, url),
      price             = fmt_price(price),
      usd_per_100g_carbs   = ifelse(is.na(usd_per_100g_carbs),   "—", paste0("$", usd_per_100g_carbs)),
      usd_per_100g_protein = ifelse(is.na(usd_per_100g_protein), "—", paste0("$", usd_per_100g_protein))
    ) |>
    select(Item = title, Price = price, `$/100g Carbs` = usd_per_100g_carbs,
           `$/100g Protein` = usd_per_100g_protein, Category = category) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = Item) |>
    tab_footnote("Nutrition data is manually entered and may be approximate.") |>
    tab_options(table.width = pct(100), table.font.size = "14px") |>
    cols_align(align = "left", columns = everything())
}
```

---

::: {.text-muted style="font-size:0.85em; text-align:center;"}
Not affiliated with Costco. Hobby project. Data may be wrong. Last updated `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`.
:::
